good_sleep.configuration.title: Good Sleep Configuration
good_sleep.configuration.allowDaySleep: Allow sleeping during day and morning. Sleeping in daylight advances time to night; sleeping at night advances to morning.
good_sleep.configuration.allowDaySleep.t: Allow sleeping during day and morning. Sleeping in daylight advances time to night; sleeping at night advances to morning.
good_sleep.configuration.healWhileSleepi: Restore health while sleeping in a bed.
Restore health while sleeping in a bed.
good_sleep.configuration.healIntervalTic: Health restore interval while sleeping (ticks). 20 ticks = 1 second. 0 = full heal the moment you lie down.
Health restore interval while sleeping (ticks). 20 ticks = 1 second. 0 = full heal the moment you lie down.
good_sleep.configuration.onePlayerSkip: Allow one player to skip the night in multiplayer (sets playersSleepingPercentage to 0).
good_sleep.configuration.onePlayerSkip.t: Allow one player to skip the night in multiplayer (sets playersSleepingPercentage to 0).
